name: SellersCommerce — Pricing Page Visitor Intelligence
description: Monitors pricing page visitors, resolves identity via Clearbit + Apollo, routes by tier, generates personalised outreach via FastAPI LLM microservice, delivers via SendGrid.
author: Akshay Gwasikoti
note: This is a structural schema for documentation and demonstration. API credentials have been redacted. Import into n8n and add your own API keys in the credential nodes.

nodes.name: Pricing Page Webhook
nodes.description: Receives POST from JS pixel when high-intent trigger fires. Entry point for entire workflow.

nodes.name: Validate Payload Schema
nodes.description: Schema validation. Rejects malformed payloads and bot traffic before any API calls.

nodes.name: High Intent Filter
nodes.description: Only proceeds if named trigger fired AND time on page >= 45s AND scroll depth >= 50%. All three must be true.

nodes.name: Log Low Intent Exit
nodes.description: Logs low-intent exits to audit sheet. No API cost incurred.

nodes.name: HubSpot — Existing Customer Check
nodes.description: Checks HubSpot BEFORE enrichment. If existing customer or active opportunity: exit. Prevents wasting API calls.

nodes.name: CRM Guardrail — Block Existing
nodes.description: Hard blocks: existing customer, opt-out, or outreach within last 30 days. All three must pass.

nodes.name: Clearbit Reveal — IP to Company
nodes.description: Resolves corporate IP to company domain + name + industry + size. First identity signal.

nodes.name: Confidence Threshold Check
nodes.description: Confidence < 80% (fuzzy > 0.2) or no domain: route to human review queue. Never proceeds with bad data.

nodes.name: Apollo.io — Find Decision Maker
nodes.description: Finds ICP-matching decision-maker at identified company. Returns verified email + title. If no match: log to ICP miss sheet, exit.

nodes.name: Suppression Check
nodes.description: Apollo returned at least one ICP contact. If empty: log as ICP miss, exit.

nodes.name: Assemble Enriched Visitor Object
nodes.description: Merges all data sources into single enriched_visitor object. Applies feature mapping logic. Computes size band. Builds UTM-tagged Calendly link.

nodes.name: Tier Router
nodes.description: Routes execution based on company size band. Three outcomes: Enterprise (Slack alert), Mid-Market (auto email), SME (log only).

nodes.name: Enterprise — Slack Alert to Sales Rep
nodes.description: Enterprise accounts get a Slack alert to sales rep — NOT an automated email. Human follow-up converts better for high-value accounts.

nodes.name: Mid-Market — FastAPI Personalisation
nodes.description: Sends enriched visitor to FastAPI microservice. Receives personalised subject + body + CTA. Falls back to static template if service fails.

nodes.name: HubSpot — Upsert Contact
nodes.description: Creates or updates HubSpot contact with enrichment data. Sets last_outreach_date for 30-day suppression.

nodes.name: SendGrid — Send Email

parameters.subject: ={{ $('Mid-Market — FastAPI Personalisation').first().json.subject_line }}
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $('Assemble Enriched Visitor Object').first().json.first_name }},

{{ $('Mid-Market — FastAPI Personalisation').first().json.opening_paragraph }}

{{ $('Mid-Market — FastAPI Personalisation').first().json.cta_line }}


Best,
The SellersCommerce Team

nodes.description: Sends personalised email via SendGrid. Subject + opening + CTA from FastAPI. Fallback_used flag logged to audit sheet.

nodes.name: SME — Log Only
nodes.description: SME visitors are logged but never emailed. Protects sender domain reputation.

nodes.name: Audit Log — All Executions
nodes.description: Append-only audit log. Every execution writes one row. Migrate to PostgreSQL at 10K+ monthly visits.

nodes.name: Error Handler — Slack Alert
nodes.description: Fires on any unhandled error. Posts to ops Slack channel with error details and node name.

environment_variables.FASTAPI_URL: http://localhost:8000 or your deployed FastAPI URL
